name: Blossomon

signature_move.name: Spiral Flower
signature_move.description: Hurls the flowers on its vines like shuriken, cutting through anything.

description: With the appearance of a giant flower, it is a Perfect Plant Digimon that grew countless vines as roots from its body. Despite its strange appearance it is very docile, and due to its personality it rarely appears before others. For a plant it has an unusually long life span, and although the petals around its body (or face, really) fall out whenever the seasons change, it has the special ability to grow back new petals. It hates arid regions, and always inhabits areas near water. Its Special Move is hurling the tiny flowers growing from its vine tips like they were shuriken ( Spiral Flower ). These flower petals can cut through anything, no matter how hard.
